question: Based on the chart, how does the total number of visits from Social compare to the total number of visits from Direct across all days shown?

options.A: Social has about half as many visits as Direct
options.B: Social has roughly the same total visits as Direct
options.C: Social has about one quarter as many visits as Direct
options.D: Social has more total visits than Direct

explanation: The y-axis starts at 1500 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Direct look as large as (or larger than) Social even though the totals favor Social.
